marketing_post.trigger: CEO asks to post, create content, or 'similar to last post'
steps: 1. Check last 3 posts for style/topic reference
2. Check content calendar for upcoming holidays/events
3. Check marketing policy (tone, hashtags, image style)
5. Suggest image concept or find template
7. On approve: schedule or post immediately

holiday_check.trigger: CEO asks about holidays, events, slow/busy days

daily_brief.trigger: morning greeting or 'hôm nay làm gì'

restaurant_check.trigger: CEO asks about restaurant status, dashboard, orders
steps: 3. Check any open issues or alerts
